news.Title: Nvidia Is Up Just 11% This Year. Here Is What History Says Happens Next.
news.Content:
Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) stock is actually beating the Nasdaq and the S&P 500 , up about 11% year to date as of July 22.

For most stocks, that's not bad at all, and most investors would take that.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

But Nvidia is not like most stocks . It is the largest company in the world by market cap and is the leader and the face of the AI revolution.

Over the last three years, it averaged a 67% annualized return, and over the previous five years, it has an average annualized return of 60%.

The last three calendar years -- from 2023 through 2025 -- it returned 38%, 170%, and 240%, respectively.

So, while it's beating the benchmarks, the return has fallen short of recent years, despite ridiculously strong revenue and earnings growth numbers and a current quarter outlook that calls for revenue to increase 11% sequentially to $91 billion.

Nvidia is trading at a near-historic low valuation

With a 90% market share in its core business of making graphics processing units (GPUs) for data centers, AI accelerators, and other applications, Nvidia is a staple in many portfolios.

But right now, this is a particularly good time to either add shares or take a new position in Nvidia. Here's why.

One, the stock's valuation is as cheap as it's been in at least the past five years. It is currently trading at 31 times earnings and 23 times forward earnings. At no time within the last five years has Nvidia's P/E ratio been as low as it's been in recent weeks.

The P/E ratio is roughly 41% below its 10-year average of 53.

And its five-year PEG ratio, which gauges the stock price in relation to its long-term earnings growth expectations, is actually in value territory. A PEG ratio below 1 means a stock is undervalued, and currently, Nvidia's is at a historic low of 0.56.

The last time Nvidia's P/E ratio was even remotely close to 31 was in April 2025 after the tariffs were announced. After that, the stock price rose from a low of $94 per share on April 4, 2025, to finish the year at $186 per share -- a gain of 99%.

A history of gains leading up to earnings reports

History also says that Nvidia's shares tend to rise leading up to its earnings report, as investors anticipate more blowout results. Over the past five quarters, starting with Q1 2025, which Nvidia reported on May 28, 2025, Nvidia stock has risen in the month before earnings were reported.

Story Continues

Some gains were smaller, like the 3% gain to $182 per share leading up to the fiscal Q2 report on Aug. 27, 2025. But some jumps were huge, like the 24% gain to $134 per share one month leading up to the Q1 report on May 28, 2025.

I'm not saying Nvidia stock will jump 24% between now and Nvidia's Aug. 26 fiscal Q2 earnings report, but there is a parallel with that 24% jump leading up to Q1 2025. At that point, Nvidia stock was trading at multiple that is similar to its current multiple.

Bottom line: This is a great time to consider Nvidia stock.

news.Title: Ark Invest's Cathie Wood Just Sold AMD Stock and Bought SpaceX. Why I'd Be Doing the Opposite.
news.Content: Ark Invest's Cathie Wood has made a name for herself with her aggressive style of investing. She likes innovative companies that have the potential to disrupt industries. Perhaps not surprisingly then, her flagship Ark Innovation ETF (NYSEMKT: ARKK) has a history of wild swings. For example, the fund produced a 67.6% gain in 2023, but that was after a 23.4% loss in 2021 and a 67% drawback in ...

• SpaceX is described as overvalued with a P/S ratio over 85, facing significant technological and financial hurdles.

news.Title: 3利空夾擊台股大跌近1200點 本週週線仍翻紅
news.Content:
Google近期公布最新財報，由於快速擴充雲端業務，現金流轉負數，加上中東衝突升溫，油價攀升，通膨問題再次讓市場憂心聯準會升息。3大利空夾集，亞洲股市今天(24日)全軍覆沒，台北股市終場大跌1,195點，跌幅2.67%，收43,654點，上市成交量縮至新台幣8,200多億，創3個月低點。本週週線仍收紅，上漲983點。

台北股市近來盤整，本週上半週原本已暫告一段落，但Google公布今年第二季財報，再次牽動全球正在AI發展路上的敏感神經。

證期雙照分析師翁偉捷指出，Google交出首季現金流為負的財報，加上本業經營情況不如市場預期，顯示本業成長速度跟不上AI燒錢的速度。另外，北美洲AI資料中心因為州政府以及民眾反對，建置速度落後，使得重要零組件可能得延後至明年才到位，而在遞延的過程中，也讓市場擔憂恐壓縮本業發展，更落實原先市場對於雲端服務商在AI資本支出是否持續性的懷疑，且進一步憂心台灣AI供應鏈廠商訂單能否達到預期，造成台股科技股24日幾乎全面重挫，大盤指數大跌近1,200點。翁偉捷說：『(原音)就是說這波資本支出是不是已經開始慢慢的週期要見頂，或者說它沒有辦法可持續；那一旦資本支出沒有辦法持續，就沒有辦法更進一步的大量創造AI需求，那我們台灣這些AI的供應鏈廠商接到訂單，從今年以後就會越來越少，就是變成是這樣子的一個連環效應的情況。』

翁偉捷指出，目前外資也正在進行獲利調節，對於股市較為不利。另外，中東局勢升溫，布蘭特原油價格一度突破每桶百美元大關，市場又進一步憂心聯準會升息對抗通膨，都不利於股市走向。由於上市成交量24日縮至只有新台幣8,200多億，為3個月來低點，分析師認為，大盤指數要能進一步上衝至45,000點之上，必須多頭氣勢強烈，成交量得進一步放大至1.2兆以上。

匯市部分，台股走弱，新台幣兌美元匯價加大貶值幅度，一度重貶近2角，來到最低32.456元，尾盤央行再調節，終場以32.358元作收，貶值9.2分。

news.Title: Want Passive Income for Retirement? Here's 1 ETF Worth Looking At.
news.Content: In retirement, it's crucial to set yourself up with reliable income to take the place of your paycheck. And you can probably count on Social Security to cover a portion of your retirement expenses. But those benefits probably won't pay your bills in full, since they're ...

• VYM focuses on large U.S. companies with above-average dividends and offers diversification across industries.
• The ETF has a low expense ratio of 0.04% and aims to provide income even during market declines.

news.Title: 台股本週震盪上漲983點　上市公司總市值142.5兆元
news.Content:
（中央社記者曾仁凱台北2026年07月24日電）台股繼上週五重挫2953.71點，創史上最大單日跌點紀錄後，本週反彈，但震盪劇烈，週五集中市場指數以43654.84點作收，週漲983.57點或2.3%。根據台灣證券交易所統計，上市公司最新總市值為新台幣142兆5792億元，較上週增加約3.2兆元。

產業別指數方面，本週漲幅最大為電腦及週邊設備類指數上漲10.29%，跌幅最大則是綠能環保類指數下跌9.04%。其他未含金融類指數上漲923.81點，漲幅約為2.42%；未含電子類指數下跌47.30點，跌幅約0.20%，；未含金融電子類指數下跌170.42點，跌幅約1.07%。

本週全體上市股票成交金額為4兆3172億元，成交金額前3名產業為，半導體類成交金額1兆6251億元，占全體上市股票交易金額比重37.64%；電子零組件類成交金額1兆132億元，占比23.47%；以及電腦及週邊設備類成交金額4206.35億元，占比9.74%。

本週集中市場股票成交量週轉率為3.20%，成交量週轉率前3名產業分別為光電類9.60%，電子零組件類7.83%，和玻璃陶瓷類7.35%。

累計今年初開盤迄今共133個交易日，集中市場總成交金額為137兆391億元，市場日平均成交金額為1兆303億元，股票成交量週轉率117.43%，股票日平均成交量週轉率0.88%。

news.Title: Better IPO Stock: Anthropic vs. OpenAI
news.Content: OpenAI and Anthropic, the companies behind ChatGPT and Claude, have waged war over control of the artificial intelligence (AI) revolution. Their latest funding raises have valued each company at nearly $1 trillion, making them two of the world's most valuable companies in just a few years. Soon, their battle for AI dominance could spill into the public markets. Both OpenAI and Anthropic have filed confidential registration statements with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, paving the way for potential IPOs. It's still unclear when either company might officially go public, but it ...
news.AI_Summary:
• OpenAI and Anthropic, key players in the AI revolution, are preparing for potential IPOs with valuations near $1 trillion.
• Anthropic is gaining traction in the enterprise market with its Claude AI, reporting an annualized revenue run rate of $47 billion.
• OpenAI, despite a larger consumer base, generates less enterprise revenue and faces challenges monetizing casual users.
• Anthropic reported its first operating profit in Q2 and shows strong revenue growth, making it a potentially better IPO stock than OpenAI.
news.Keywords: AI, IPO, enterprise market, profitability, revenue growth

news.Title: US stocks face tests from Fed decision, tech-led earnings deluge
news.Content: By Lewis Krauskopf NEW YORK, July 24 (Reuters) - A wobbly U.S. stock market will take its cues in the coming week from a Federal Reserve meeting set to shed light on the path for interest rates, and from a packed slate of corporate earnings led by technology companies and heavyweights in artificial intelligence. More from Yahoo Scout Why are investors walking on eggshells currently? How might AI spending concerns affect major earnings? What economic data could impact market sentiment? What ...
news.AI_Summary:
• US stocks face uncertainty from the Federal Reserve's interest rate decisions and a heavy tech earnings season.
• Alphabet and Tesla's stock declines, partly due to increased AI spending, set a negative tone for upcoming earnings from Microsoft, Amazon, and Meta.
• Rising oil prices and inflation fears could pressure the Fed to maintain or increase interest rates, impacting borrowing costs and equity valuations.
• Investors are cautious ('walking on eggshells') ahead of earnings and Fed announcements, with the S&P 500 up 8% year-to-date but showing signs of being 'frothy'.
news.Keywords: Federal Reserve, interest rates, earnings season, AI spending, market sentiment

news.Title: 台股重挫千點　金管會：反映國際情勢持續關注波動
news.Content:
（中央社記者蘇思云高雄2026年07月24日電）台股今天終場下跌1195.97點，為史上第9大跌點。金管會今天表示，台股主要反映國際情勢，將持續關注股市波動情形，並請證交所及櫃買中心密切注意國際金融市場變化情形。

投資人對AI巨額支出擔憂浮現，加上中東衝突加劇推升國際油價，美股下挫。台股今天開低走低，終場下跌1195.97點，為歷史第9大跌點，摜破季線約43964點。

金管會今天表示，台股7月24日收盤指數為43654.84點，下跌1195.97點，跌幅2.67%，成交值約新台幣7924.35億元，同時段（截至今天下午1時30分）亞洲主要股市狀況，新加坡跌0.35%、上海跌1.05%、香港跌1.17%、日本跌2.78%、韓國跌4.98%。

金管會指出，集中市場截至今年6月底本益比約31.78倍，現金殖利率1.56%（加計股票股利為1.59%），國內上市櫃公司今年截至6月底累計營收合計約30.49兆元，較去年同期增加35.96%。

截至7月23日，信用交易整戶擔保維持率為181.07%，高於券商規定的130%最低追繳門檻，借券賣出占市場成交值比率為3.19%。

news.Title: Why Braze Stock Was Sliding This Week
news.Content: Tech stocks that weren't manufacturers of artificial intelligence (AI) hardware were feeling the squeeze this week. Several top tech companies indicated plans to spend heavily on building out their AI capabilities; with that, investors aggressively sold ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tech stocks, particularly software companies, are under pressure as major players like Alphabet signal increased spending on AI infrastructure.
• Braze (BRZE) shares fell 15% week-to-date, caught in a broader sell-off of software companies.
• Alphabet's raised capital expenditure guidance ($195-$205 billion) for AI infrastructure spooked investors, suggesting a diversion of IT budgets from software.
• This 'AI spend disruption' fear may linger, making companies like Braze a mid- to long-term play rather than an immediate opportunity.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, capital expenditure, software sector, market rotation, investor sentiment

In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total ...
news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: 500萬開雙倍槓桿！ 他想買正二「刪APP拚暴富」 網嚇傻：賭輸超慘
news.Content:
不少人會利用正二放大獲利，但風險也要評估。有網友表示，有約500萬資金可投入股市，其中180萬是信貸，想了4種投資配置，其中有「無腦ALL IN正2」引發熱議。

該名網友在論壇PTT上以「500萬元資金配置」為題發文請益，表示自己近期手邊將有500萬元可運用，考慮以下4種投資方案：

Ａ、將70%資金投入正2，保留30%現金，每季或每半年定期再平衡，暴漲暴跌再平衡。

Ｂ、買1張台積電， 質押投入0050（匯回當擔保品）， 剩下約260萬元資金全丟正2，每月定期定額投入0050、正2。

Ｃ、買1張台積電， 質押投入0050（匯回當擔保品）， 留下100萬現金，剩下約160萬丟正2 每月定期定額投入0050、正2 。

Ｄ、無腦ALL IN正2，設定定期定額再投入正2，之後就刪掉app長期持有。

並補充說明，投入的資金中，除了180萬是信貸外，其他都是自己的原有資金，短期（2年內）應該沒有使用大筆資金需求，想問問其他網友的看法和建議。

此貼文吸引許多網友留言討論，不少人建議D方案：「我會選 D」、「問就是all in 正2」、「問就是正二刪app」，不過，也有人提醒，原PO的資金中有信貸，還買正二，需要仔細評估風險，不能只看報酬潛力：「都信貸了還買正2，你算過曝險嗎」、「借錢就已經是開槓桿了，還買正2是把槓桿倍數再往上拉，賭贏很爽，賭輸很慘」、「180萬都借的還要再壓正二，那不就是雙倍x2槓桿，風險要自己算一下，買正二就刪APP，但我相信刪APP你一定做不到」。

▼有網友提醒原PO，信貸180萬已是開槓桿，再押正二形同雙倍槓桿，必須更仔細評估風險，不能只看報酬潛力。（示意圖／取自 Pexels ）

另外，也有網友認為，原PO可以改主投0050更為穩妥：「歐印0050最省心」、「0050，睡覺」，與其承擔高波動，不如選擇較單純的大盤型ETF。還有網友建議，與其在4個方案中二選一，不如先分批投入並保留資金調度空間：「最好的方法就是資金分成4份，分批投入，保持現金調度」，</p

news.Title: 台股摜破季線 三個月最低量撞上千點殺盤 油品風暴三董座親上火線｜Yahoo財經掃描
news.Content:
季線失手！台股今日開盤後一路下殺，終場重挫1,195.97點、跌幅2.67%，收在43,654.84點，失守4萬4千點及季線，寫下史上第九大收盤跌點；成交金額縮至7,941.75億元，為4月13日以來新低。不過本周仍上漲983.57點，周K線終結連兩黑。 台積電(2330) 下跌55元、收2,350元，跌幅2.29%，單一個股拖累大盤約425點；權值股聯發科(2454)、台達電(2308)、 日月光投控(3711) 及 聯電(2303) 同步走弱。觀察盤面，AI伺服器與軍工族群相對有撐， 緯創(3231) 受AI伺服器需求及AMD題材支撐，逆勢上漲3.17%；其餘大型權值股、記憶體、塑化、ABF載板及矽晶圓族群全面承壓。另外，食品股方面，中聯油脂致癌油風暴延燒逾3周， 泰山(1218) 、 福壽(1219) 及 福懋油(1225) 三大董座首度共同現身致歉，宣布問題油品全數下架、不再上市銷售，食安責任、賠償及復工進度持續牽動市場信心。此外，封測大廠 頎邦(6147) 因遭檢調搜索引爆不確定性，儘管公司強調業務與財務未受重大影響，股價仍以158元一字鎖住跌停，成為盤面另一焦點。

亞股今日也全面收跌，日股下跌2.73%，韓國綜合指數重挫5.72%，港股下跌0.98%，上證指數也走弱1.61%。

AI資本支出大增、科技巨擘自由現金流由正轉負，重新點燃市場對「燒錢換成長」的疑慮，加上布蘭特原油期貨站上每桶100美元、美國新一輪301關稅生效在即，以及初領失業救濟金降至18.7萬人的強勁就業數據推升利率壓力，美國四大指數23日全面走低。個股表現，，Alphabet雖繳出亮眼雲端營收，但上修AI資本支出、自由現金流轉負，股價重挫7.1%；特斯拉獲利不如預期，股價大跌近15%。亞馬遜、Meta及微軟分別下跌4.5%、4.1%及2.5%；台積電ADR也下跌1.34%。

📝盤點熱門股：群益臺灣加權正2、主動統一升級50、元大台灣50正2

熱門成交排行榜方面，ETF包辦前三名， 群益臺灣加權正2(00685L) 以33.68萬張居冠，台股終場重挫逾千點，槓桿損失放大，引爆停損、低接與部位調整需求，股價承壓走低； 主動統一升級50(00403A) 居次，隨大盤下挫而跌破發行價，近百萬受益人高度關注，賣壓與低接買盤交鋒帶動換手熱絡； 元大台灣50正2(00631L) 居第三，同樣受台股重挫拖累下跌，槓桿搶短與避險調節推升交易熱度。

面板股 群創(3481) 排名第四，在大盤殺聲隆隆下賣壓湧現、股價走弱，多空激烈換手維持高人氣；ODM股 緯創(3231) 居第五，受AI伺服器需求強勁題材支撐，逆勢走揚成前五名唯一紅盤股，短線追價與獲利了結買賣熱絡，但分析師提醒僅適合順勢短打。

📌三大法人買賣超

三大法人今日合計賣超663.94億元，其中，外資大舉賣超609.50億元，成為主要提款力量；投信則逆勢買超57.08億元，站在買方承接。自營商自行買賣與避險部位加總賣超111.51億元，同步偏空操作。整體來看，外資與自營商聯手調節，賣壓明顯壓過投信買盤，資金面轉趨保守，加重台股下跌壓力。

✨本日議題股：AMD概念股

AMD概念股成今日盤面焦點， 緯創(3231) 受惠新一代Helios AI機櫃訂單題材，盤中逆勢大漲逾6%，終場收179元、上漲3.17%；緯穎(6669)也獲AMD執行長蘇姿丰親自點名為基礎設施合作夥伴，台灣供應鏈...... 點我看更多

👥三大油廠親上火線：

本日話題聚焦中聯油脂問題油風暴，事件延燒逾3周後，三大油廠 泰山(1218) 、 福壽(1219) 及 福懋油(1225) 董事長首度共同現身致歉，並宣布問題油品全數下架回收、不再上市銷售。泰山董座劉偉龍強調，身為中聯股東負有監督責任，針對4月至6月生產的7批列管問題油品，以及另19批檢驗合格但仍存疑慮的產品，將全數回收，並主張中聯在食安疑慮完全排除前不得復工...... 點我看更多

🔭重大財經事件展望

下周一(27日)國際財經焦點，先看美國市場，將公布6月耐久財訂單與7月達拉斯聯準銀行製造業指數，市場將觀察企業資本支出、製造業景氣與關稅政策影響；歐洲方面，歐元區將公布6月貨幣供給M3，德國則發布7月IFO商業景氣指數，資金動能與企業信心可望牽動歐元及歐股表現；亞太區方面，日本將公布5月景氣動向指數終值，新加坡發布6月工業生產數據，區域製造與出口動能成為觀察重點；陸港澳方面，中國大陸將公布6月規模以上工業企業利潤，香港則發布6月進出口與商品貿易收支，內需復甦力道、企業獲利及外貿表現備受關注。

台灣方面，周一並無大型股東會及重量級法說會，市場焦點轉向除權息行情，半導體族群可留意閎康(3587)、台半(5425)、訊芯-KY(6451)、M31(6643)與IET-KY(4971)，其他除權息個股包括亞崴(1530)、同致(3552)、康和證(6016)及青松健康(6931)等，填權息速度將反映資金追價意願；籌資動態方面，樂事綠能(1529)與汎瑋材料(6967)辦理現金增資，後續資金用途及對股本的稀釋效應值得留意。

市場變化難捉摸？面對股市的大起大落，總會有看不懂、跟不上、難決策的時刻！ Yahoo財經掃描 每個台股交易日晚間6點上菜，整理市場最重要的財經熱點，從國際財經趨勢、產業焦點到個股異動，迅速掌握投資脈動，帶你快人一步，掌握市場先機。

註：加權指數成交金額含盤後定價，不含零股、鉅額、拍賣及標購

（核稿編輯：陳景淵）

news.Title: Top Vanguard ETF Crushing S&P 500 Returns So Far in 2026

news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: European shares gain as SAP lifts tech stocks; Middle East on watch
news.Content:
By Tharuniyaa Lakshmi and Purvi Agarwal

July 24 (Reuters) - European shares recovered on Friday after registering their steepest one-day loss in two weeks in the previous session, as investors drew comfort from some corporate ‌earnings and assessed the impact higher oil prices could have on monetary policy.

The pan-European STOXX 600 index edged ‌0.5% higher to 642.62 by 0835 GMT, leaving it to swing between gains and losses for the week.

Germany's DAX rose as SAP gained 6.2% ​after the software group reported second-quarter current cloud backlog growth ahead of analyst expectations.

The broader technology index added 1.4%, reclaiming some lost ground after quarterly updates from STMicroelectronics and BE Semiconductor failed to impress investors on Thursday.

Markets have been trying to balance AI-driven growth against stretched valuations and returns from hefty investments in the technology, leading to swings in the sector of ‌late.

"The two big problems for the big ⁠tech companies are that capex is no longer being funded out of free cash flow alone and that cheaper open-source AI is seriously threatening business models," said Deutsche Bank analysts led ⁠by Jim Reid.

The STOXX 600 technology sector is up 16% so far this year, just behind energy stocks that have surged about 32%.

On Friday, oil and gas stocks failed to capitalize on Brent crude prices that remained over $100 a barrel, as a 10% ​drop ​in Neste weighed after the Finnish biofuel maker and oil refiner ​reported second-quarter core profit slightly below expectations.

"We've moved ‌from pricing in a period of weak growth and higher inflation to potentially even recession. We're not quite there yet... but we could get to that point very quickly," said Chris Beauchamp, chief market analyst at IG.

The European Central Bank may need to raise interest rates again as inflation risks ran high, three policymakers said on Friday, after the bank left rates steady on Thursday but kept a September hike on the table.

Markets are still pricing in a 25-basis-point ‌increase and about a 70% chance of another similar hike by the ​end of 2026, according to LSEG-compiled data.

Meanwhile, the U.S. administration imposed ​new tariffs of 10% and 12.5% on goods from ​60 trading partners, over allegations of lax enforcement of forced labour bans, just as a ‌temporary 10% global tariff expired.

Among other stocks, Volkswagen was ​little changed after the carmaker ​dropped its previous revenue growth forecast following a 9.5% slump in second-quarter profit.

Story Continues

Valmet soared 20% and was on track for its biggest one-day jump on record after the pulp, paper and energy technology company posted second-quarter ​results ahead of expectations and announced a ‌potential business separation.

Sweden's Securitas slid 11% and was set for its steepest one-day drop since August ​2007 after the security services providers reported a lower-than-expected second-quarter core profit.

(Reporting by Tharuniyaa Lakshmi and Purvi ​Agarwal in Bengaluru; Editing by Sonia Cheema and Maju Samuel)

news.Title: 2 Vanguard Index Funds Are Crushing the S&P 500 This Year
news.Content:
The S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) has advanced 10% in the past year, an impressive return by any standard. But these two Vanguard index funds have generated superior returns:

The Vanguard U.S. Momentum Factor ETF (NYSEMKT: VFMO) has added 22% year to date.

The Vanguard Information Technology ETF (NYSEMKT: VGT) has added 23% year to date.

Here's what investors should know about these index funds.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

The Vanguard Momentum Factor ETF: 22% gain year to date

The Vanguard Momentum Factor ETF is an actively managed fund that uses a rules-based quantitative model to select stocks with strong recent performance. It currently tracks 670 equities, most of which come from the technology sector . The top five holdings are, as listed by weight:

Alphabet : 1.3%

Applied Materials: 0.9%

Advanced Micro Devices: 0.9%

KLA: 0.8%

Micron Technology: 0.8%

If dividends were reinvested, the Vanguard U.S. Momentum Factor ETF returned 88% over the past three years, which is equivalent to 23.4% annually. But the S&P 500 returned 71%, which is equivalent to 19.6% annually. Going further back, the Vanguard U.S. Momentum Factor also beat the S&P 500 by four percentage points over the past five years.

With a modest expense ratio of 0.13% and track record for outperformance, this Vanguard index fund is a convenient way to get exposure to the hottest stocks on the market. But investors should understand that momentum stocks tend to be more volatile than the broader market, and volatility cuts both ways.

Momentum stocks tend to outperform when the broader market is rising, but they tend to underperform when the broader market is falling. For instance, after President Trump announced sweeping tariffs in April 2025, the S&P 500 declined 19% while the Vanguard U.S. Momentum Factor ETF dropped 25%.

The Vanguard Information Technology ETF: 23% gain year to date

The Vanguard Information Technology ETF is a passive fund that tracks 321 small, medium, and large stocks in the technology sector. The index fund is most heavily weighted toward the semiconductor, hardware, and software industries, but it also includes IT consultants and electronic component suppliers. The five largest holdings are:

Nvidia: 16.1%

Apple: 14.3%

Microsoft: 8.2%

Micron Technology: 5%

Broadcom: 3.8%

Story Continues

If dividends were reinvested, the Vanguard Information Technology ETF returned 105% over the last three years, which is equivalent to 27.1% annually. Meanwhile, the S&P 500 gained 71%, which is equivalent to 19.6% annually. The Vanguard Information Technology ETF also beat the S&P 500 by 46 percentage points over the past five years.

With an expense ratio of 0.09%, this fund provides cheap exposure to hundreds of stocks that are likely to benefit from the artificial intelligence boom. Furthermore, the index fund currently trades at 36 times earnings, which is a reasonable valuation when technology sector earnings are projected to increase at 44% annually through 2027, according to LSEG.

However, the Vanguard Information Technology ETF is also highly concentrated in a small number of stocks. Nvidia, Apple, and Microsoft account for nearly 40% of the fund's performance. So, investors who already own large positions in those stocks should avoid this index fund unless they truly want to double down on those companies.

Here's the big picture: Index funds are essentially ready-made portfolios that make investing simpler. They are a great option for anyone who prefers not to research individual stocks, but investors don't have to choose between the two. In fact, CNBC's Jim Cramer recently made a good argument for owning both. He thinks investors should split their money 50-50 between index funds and stocks. He says index funds are "insurance against your individual stock portfolio blowing up in your face."

news.Title: 3 High-Yield Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now for a Lifetime of Rising Passive Income
news.Content:
Energy can be one of the trickiest sectors of the stock market to navigate. Energy literally drives the global economy, from the gas in your vehicle to the electricity powering data centers for artificial intelligence (AI). But the industry can be volatile, with recessions and other events swinging commodity prices and sending companies scrambling in short order.

But if you focus on quality, you can find dependable energy sector dividend stocks with high yields. What does that look like? Three companies instantly come to mind.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

First is Energy Transfer (NYSE: ET), a massive midstream company with a 6.6% yield. And Chevron (NYSE: CVX) and ExxonMobil (NYSE: XOM) are two of the world's premier oil majors, with decades of consistency backing up their reputations and generous dividends.

Here's a closer look at why these three stocks can deliver a lifetime of rising passive income.

1. Energy Transfer: An oil and gas midstream powerhouse

If your goal is to maximize your income from Day 1, it's hard to do better than Energy Transfer's staggering 6.6% yield. Its sprawling network of 140,000 miles of pipelines and storage facilities functions like a toll road, collecting fees as it moves oil and gas throughout the United States. Energy Transfer isn't very sensitive to commodity prices; fees account for 90% of its total revenue.

Energy Transfer has a significant presence in the Permian Basin, near America's major natural gas export hubs. It's a significant growth opportunity as the country's export activity continues to rise. Management's stated goal is to grow the company's distributable cash flow by 3%-5% annually over the long term, while maintaining a financial cushion in the payout ratio.

Energy Transfer is a master limited partnership (MLP). It doesn't pay corporate income taxes because it passes its profits, losses, and deductions to the limited partners, the unit holders who invest in the company. If you own this stock, you may need to complete a K-1 form as part of your personal tax filing to the IRS.

2. Chevron: An integrated major built for any market

Chevron is one of the world's premier integrated oil and gas companies operating across the industry. It performs upstream operations, such as exploration and production, as well as downstream activities, like refining. That diversification helps soften the blow when commodity prices fall during recessions, though the company probably prefers higher oil prices.

Story Continues

The stock currently yields over 3.7%, and Chevron has increased its dividend for 39 consecutive years. That growth streak spans multiple recessions, even a global pandemic, during which oil prices fell below zero for the first time. It's a testament to management's ability to navigate the energy industry's boom-and-bust cycles. Chevron also has a global footprint, which positions it for growth as global energy needs rise.

It's hard to plan for the long term, but Chevron does have strong growth prospects . Following its acquisition of Hess last year, the company now owns a 30% stake in the Guyana Stabroek Block, one of the largest discoveries in recent history. Management anticipates the company's cash flow growing by around 10% annually through 2030.

3. ExxonMobil: This dividend legend still has a bright future

ExxonMobil is the 800-pound gorilla in the industry, the largest oil and gas major in the United States. Like Chevron, it's a global company with upstream and downstream operations. ExxonMobil also has an extensive dividend track record, with 43 consecutive annual increases. The stock yields 2.8%, the lowest of the three, but still nearly three times the passive income they'll find in an S&P 500 index fund.

Due to its immense size, ExxonMobil has one of the world's strongest balance sheets and has leaned on it during market downturns to preserve its precious dividend. Management has leaned into its oil and gas roots in recent years, acquiring Pioneer Natural Resources in late 2023 to boost its growth prospects and then focusing on efficiency to free up cash flow.

The result? ExxonMobil is sitting pretty with extensive acreage in the Permian Basin and Guyana, which should help drive oil and gas production for the foreseeable future. Even if global oil and gas demand eventually peaks, ExxonMobil and other industry giants will be able to absorb smaller players to preserve their businesses as the industry slowly consolidates. That makes ExxonMobil a safe bet for the long haul.

news.Title: 台灣採購經理人營運展望：製造業/非製造業同步轉強
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-07-24 16:52:19 陳怡潔 發佈

中華經濟研究院今(24)日發布最新台灣採購經理人營運展望調查，調查顯示，製造業營運展望轉強，但成本與售價轉嫁落差仍是主軸，製造業下半年並非單純需求擴張，而是「景氣續揚、成本仍高、部分轉嫁」的組合。非製造業方面，廠商預期需求支撐延續，惟成本與服務報價同步上修，下半年展望由「成本推升」轉向「營運與利潤改善」，但人力僱用與成本仍限制獲利彈性。未來一年展望方面，調查顯示，製造業與非製造業同步轉強，但供應鏈位置是利潤關鍵。另外，調查也顯示，台積電(2330)與半導體供應鏈外溢效益的範圍大於直接供應商名單，全體製造業中有17.6%已切入台積電或半導體供應鏈，另有10.6%規劃進入，並有38.8%表示，AI與先進製程需求使採購與營運出現明顯變化。

中經院發布今(2026)年上半年台灣採購經理人營運展望調查，彙整調查台灣製造業與非製造業2026年下半年營運展望、地緣政治與中東衝擊、供應鏈風險管理、產能利用率與設廠布局、企業合作、整併與聯盟動態、台積電與半導體供應鏈外溢，以及AI導入對人力與營運成本之影響，本次調查顯示，台灣企業轉型與競爭力焦點已由單點擴產與短期價格因應，轉向轉嫁能力、關鍵料件備援、合作網絡與跨區域服務能力。

製造業營運展望方面，調查顯示，製造業營運展望轉強，但成本與售價轉嫁落差仍是主軸；2026年下半年製造業營運狀況擴散指數為64.1%，採購價格為69.0%，平均上升3.1個百分點；平均銷售價格為59.2%，平均上升1.5個百分點；利潤率為53.1%。換言之，下半年並非單純需求擴張，而是「景氣續揚、成本仍高、部分轉嫁」的組合。

非製造營運展望方面，調查顯示，非製造業需求支撐延續，惟成本與服務報價同步上修；2026年下半年非製造業營運狀況擴散指數攀升至66.0%，利潤率升至59.4%，僱用人數為59.2%；薪資費用與採購成本雖較前期略降，仍分別達64.2%與62.0%，服務收費價格亦升至58.6%。下半年展望由「成本推升」轉向「營運與利潤改善」，但人力僱用與成本仍限制獲利彈性。

未來一年展望方面，調查顯示，製造業與非製造業同步轉強，但供應鏈位置是利潤關鍵。展望未來一年，製造業營運展望擴散指數由2025年12月的59.6%升至66.5%，45.3%認為較佳、42.4%持平、12.2%較差；非製造業則由59.4%升至69.8%，46.0%認為較佳、47.6%持平、僅6.4%較差。製造業雖轉強，但相對於非製造業，製造業仍有較多保守觀望。

中經院表示，綜合本次調查，2026年下半年並非「全面復甦」或「全面擴產」，而是營運改善、成本高檔、轉嫁分化、關鍵料件備援、合作聯盟與半導體外溢同時發生。企業競爭不再只看產業名稱，而要看其位於供應鏈的哪一個位置、是否掌握關鍵客戶與材料、能否轉嫁成本、是否能透過聯盟與多點服務降低中斷風險，以及AI能否真正嵌入流程並形成可量化效益。

另外，關於台積電與半導體供應鏈外溢議題，製造業部份，調查顯示，電子業主動切入、上游原物料與特化相關業者隨鏈移動、設備多點延伸；全體製造業中，有17.6%已切入台積電或半導體供應鏈，另有10.6%規劃進入；並有38.8%表示，AI與先進製程需求使採購與營運出現明顯變化，顯示外溢範圍大於直接供應商名單。已出現變化者中，52.6%回報訂單或詢單增加，40.0%採購量增加或備料期拉長，38.9%相關營收比重提高，26.3%增加設備或廠房投資。

其中，電子暨光學是直接切入與美國布局的核心，有22.0%已切入供應鏈，54.0%營運已變化，38.0%已經或規劃布局美國，均為各產業最高。電力暨機械設備則有20.6%已切入、41.2%營運已變化、29.4%已布局美國，呈現設備商貼近客戶廠區、建立跨區域服務能力的多點延伸。基礎原物料與化學暨生技醫療的美國布局，則較多由核心客戶與合作夥伴帶動。

調查也顯示，整體製造業已有或規劃布局美國者占28.2%。在已布局者中，52.2%設立辦事處或業務據點，27.5%透過客戶／夥伴布局，15.9%設立工廠或產線，14.5%設立倉儲物流中心，透過墨西哥、加拿大或第三地布局者僅10.1%，顯示直接布局仍是主流，但工廠與產線門檻較高。

非製造業方面，調查顯示，非製造業已有或規劃服務台積電或半導體客戶者占29.2%，26.8%表示，半導體、AI需求已帶動服務需求、客戶組成或營運投資變化，17.2%已經或規劃布局美國市場或服務據點。然而非製造業不是直接「製造供應商名單」，而是半導體需求背後的物流、工程、專業服務、金融與通路節點。

調查顯示，非製造業已經服務半導體供應鏈者占26.4%，其中48.5%直接提供產品、工程或服務給台積電，45.5%透過下游客戶或承包商間接服務，33.3%服務其他半導體或高階製程客戶。然而相關服務提供者集中在特定產業別，以運輸倉儲42.3%、教育暨專業科學服務 (IP/IC設計)30.8%、營造暨不動產35.5%、批發22.7%及金融保險28.6%的服務關聯較高。

非製造業回報已出現營運變化者中，有65.7%回報客戶詢問、訂單或服務需求增加，50.7%增加人力、教育訓練或專業服務能力，47.8%相關營收比重提高，35.8%拓展半導體、AI或高階製造客戶。此則顯示，目前外溢不是立刻推動全面性景氣熱絡，而是從需求詢問、專業能力須同步提升、營收比重到營運投資逐步擴散。

《美股主題週報》數位主權—MSFT、ORCL、PLTR

星展：各項指標顯示，AI超級循環動能正接近高峰

news.Title: Some Investors Believe SK Hynix Could Be the Next Big AI Stock. History Says It's Not Time to Buy Shares Just Yet.
news.Content:
South Korean memory chip company SK Hynix (NASDAQ: SKHY) began trading on the Nasdaq Exchange through a large secondary listing earlier this month, and after an initial boom, the stock has been pretty volatile.

SK Hynix's common shares were already publicly traded on South Korea's exchange, and the new listing was for its American depositary receipts ( ADRs ) -- essentially, certificates that represent the underlying foreign stock, making it simpler for U.S. investors to buy and sell it on American markets.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

Many investors are likely hoping SK Hynix will be the next big artificial intelligence (AI) stock. The company provides important memory products for data centers, and its sales and earnings have been surging amid rising demand and tight supply.

Yet despite all that SK Hynix has going for it, there's a good reason why investors should at least wait until next summer before they consider buying the stock.

What SK Hynix does and why investors are excited about it

SK Hynix sells NAND flash and DRAM memory that goes into a host of technologies, from Apple 's iPhones to AI data centers. Just like peers such as Micron Technology , SK Hynix is benefiting from a strong spike in demand for memory processors driven by accelerating AI infrastructure spending. The deep shortage this has led to is not just boosting sales for memory companies, but also benefiting their bottom lines because they can charge much more for memory chips.

SK Hynix's sales jumped 198% year over year to $35.5 billion in the first quarter, and its earnings popped almost 400% to nearly $27 billion. This impressive top- and bottom-line growth is why many investors are excited about the company's long-term potential. The company's operating margin also reached a record 72% in the first quarter, up from 42% in the year-ago quarter.

And as long as demand for memory continues to boom, SK Hynix will keep benefiting. The company is one of the leading memory providers for Nvidia and commands an estimated 58% of the high-bandwidth memory (HBM) market. For comparison, Micron has just 21% of the HBM market.

And there's a good chance that memory demand will keep outpacing supply. A host of tech companies are battling for leading positions in the AI sector, and to stay competitive, most of them are spending piles of cash. The top four hyperscalers -- Meta , Alphabet , Microsoft , and Amazon -- have said they plan to spend a combined $750 billion on AI infrastructure this year alone.

Story Continues

No one knows when the pace of that spending will wane, but the answer is probably not anytime soon. Alphabet has already said it will spend more next year than it spent this year. And other companies, like SpaceX, are ramping up their AI capex as well.

In short, SK Hynix's memory products will likely remain high on tech companies' shopping lists for a while.

It's not the time to buy SK Hynix stock just yet

All of the above provides a pretty compelling case for buying SK Hynix stock right now. Adding to the stock's appeal is that its shares trade at a price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio of just 28, far below the tech industry's average P/E ratio of 35.

So what's the problem?

SK Hynix's ADR shares currently trade at about a 35% premium compared to its common shares in South Korea, and the premium has been as high as 51%. A 2025 study by MCSI found that from 2020 to 2025, the average divergence in price between ADRs and their locally listed common stocks was in the range of 2% to 4%.

As a recent Financial Time s article noted:

"Most ADRs trade with a small (less than 5 per cent) premium above the foreign-listed equity due to some mixture of convenience and fees. A 51 per cent premium is huge, and speaks to the enormous US flows into memory at this exceptional moment."

In short, the price premium that U.S. investors are paying for SK Hynix now isn't normal. And the gap likely won't last.

To be sure, some premium pricing can persist. Taiwan Semiconductor , another popular AI stock, currently has a 15% ADR premium due to heavy U.S. demand. But SK Hynix's premium is well beyond that.

History suggests the gap will eventually narrow, putting downward pressure on the ADR price. Until that premium cools off significantly, investors may want to hold off on buying into this major memory chip player.

news.Title: 台股崩盤主動式ETF躺槍！專家曝5檔績效吊車尾 有一共通點
news.Content:
台股今（24）日終場重挫1195.97點或2.67%，創下史上第9大跌點，財經專家葉育碩在臉書發文表示，台股掃到韓國颱風尾，韓股重挫5.72%進而拖累盤勢，目前績效吊車尾前五名的主動式ETF，清一色都是在今年五月後才上市。

葉育碩指出，台股近期非常弱勢，連月線都站不上去，也因為市場開始修正，反而更容易看出一些主動式ETF的弱點。牛市的時候，大家都在比誰漲得快、誰最會選股，但行情一旦轉弱，就開始考驗經理人的選股能力、風險控管，以及建倉時機。

雖然同樣都是主動式ETF，績效卻已經開始出現明顯落差。葉育碩進一步表示，越早成立的產品，有機會先參與上一波行情，建倉成本相對有優勢。但越晚成立的產品，如果剛好遇到市場震盪，或是在相對高點開始布局，短期績效自然比較吃虧。

盤點目前主動式ETF吊車尾前五名，包括00405A主動富邦台灣龍耀、00407A主動凱基台灣、00406A主動中信台灣收益、00404A主動聯博動能50及00403A主動統一升級50。

葉育碩提到，上述這些績效差的主動式ETF，清一色都是在今年五月後上市，提醒股民，市場好的時候，很多產品看起來都很厲害，真正能看出差距的，往往是在空頭或震盪盤。

news.Title: Is Marvell Technology the New Nvidia?
news.Content:
Marvell Technology (NASDAQ: MRVL) has emerged as a strong AI investment candidate throughout 2026. It has a great bull thesis and is right at the heart of the AI buildout.

Furthermore, Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) has invested $2 billion into Marvell and announced several strategic partnerships to ensure that Nvidia's computing units function on Marvell's products. This is a big deal because Marvell is starting to grow its custom AI chip business, and this could be a major part of the company someday, especially with the two major clients that it has.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

But is this enough to make Marvell the new Nvidia? Let's take a look.

Marvell's custom AI chip business could take off over the next few years

Marvell makes connectivity devices for data centers and also assists AI hyperscalers design custom chips. This is a great business to be in right now, as the AI buildout is full steam ahead. In its custom AI chip business, Marvel has captured two major clients: Amazon and Microsoft . These two companies operated the largest and second-largest cloud computing platforms in the world, and having these two as clients is a big deal for Marvell, as it gives them a major customer that wants to reduce reliance on Nvidia chips through designing their own.

This may seem like an odd relationship, because Marvell is actively pursuing an industry that undermines Nvidia's GPU business despite Nvidia investing in them. However, Nvidia isn't concerned, because it understands that GPU-based training and inference are necessary in some applications, and that custom AI chips are better for the job in others. But, because Nvidia is making sure that Marvell's chips plug into its existing network, it ensures that Nvidia chips will still be used alongside any custom chip Marvell produces. That's a great spot to be in, but can Marvell become a new Nvidia?

I don't think so. Why? It's really more like Broadcom (NASDAQ: AVGO).

Broadcom is a far better comparison

While Nvidia is the name in AI computing, Broadcom is following close behind. Like Marvell, Broadcom designs custom AI chips and has connectivity switches and networking equipment. This makes these two very similar and shares a lot more business overlap than they do with Nvidia. Broadcom's custom AI chip customers include Meta Platforms , Anthropic, OpenAI, and the biggest custom AI chip customer right now, Alphabet .

Story Continues

So, is Marvell a better buy than Broadcom or even Nvidia? Let's take a look.

For the current fiscal year, Wall Street analysts expect Marvell to deliver 41% revenue growth and 45% during the next fiscal year. While that's a solid growth rate, it's still behind Broadcom's expected 66% growth rate this year and 63% for next year. Nvidia is expected to generate 82% growth this year and 42% next year, although the analyst community has historically underprojected Nvidia's growth rate for years.

Despite those stronger growth outlook figures, Broadcom and Nvidia trade at far cheaper price tags than Marvell.

Why? Well, Marvell is the new shiny toy in this segment of the market. After three years of dominance, investors have gotten bored with Nvidia despite a strong outlook, and Broadcom is nearing the same level of complacency. However, individual investors don't need to get wrapped up in market sentiment like that. Instead, they should just look at the facts to decide which is the better stock pick.

While Nvidia and Marvell may not be in the same industry, Nvidia's valuation is less than half of Marvell's despite similar growth rates expected for next year . Broadcom is pretty much in the same industry as Marvell, but is valued at a much lower price tag and is expected to grow at a much faster rate. I think that combining these two makes them better buys than Marvell, and investors should be focused on these two established winners versus Marvell.

news.Title: Want to Be a Millionaire? Buy These 3 Stocks and Hold for 20 Years
news.Content:
What's the easiest path to creating significant wealth? You don't have to time the market perfectly. Instead, you just need to invest in businesses that are well-positioned to profit from unstoppable trends -- and own them long enough for the power of compounding to do its magic.

I think three stocks are great picks for this strategy. Want to be a millionaire? Buy GE Vernova (NYSE: GEV), NextEra Energy (NYSE: NEE), and Brookfield Infrastucture (NYSE: BIP) (NYSE: BIPC) and hold them for 20 years.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

1. GE Vernova: powering the AI revolution

GE Vernova's shares have skyrocketed in 2026. Wall Street thinks the industrial stock can go even higher over the next 12 months. But this isn't a kind of stock to own for only a year or so. GE Vernova is a fantastic long-term pick.

The company's technologies are used to generate around 25% of the world's electricity. GE Vernova has installed around 7,000 gas turbines -- the largest fleet based on wattage. Its installed base of wind turbines totals roughly 59,000 and includes the largest installed base of onshore wind turbines in the U.S.

GE Vernova's backlog jumped $13 billion quarter-over-quarter in Q1 to $163 billion. This total represents more than 3.5 years of annual sales based on the company's 2026 revenue guidance.

Booming demand for artificial intelligence (AI) is a key factor behind GE Vernova's impressive growth. It's no exaggeration to say that the company is powering the AI revolution. Other trends are also driving global electrification, though, and serving as tailwinds for GE Vernova, including the transition from coal-fueled power plants to natural gas.

2. NextEra Energy: the king of the utilities sector

NextEra Energy is the largest electric utility in the U.S. It's the largest energy infrastructure company in North America. The company is a global leader in renewable energy and battery storage. And it will soon be even bigger.

Two months ago, NextEra announced plans to acquire Dominion Energy (NYSE: D) in an all-stock transaction valued at $66.8 billion. This deal will make the combined entity the world's largest regulated electric utility by market cap.

NextEra expects to deliver strong adjusted earnings per share (EPS) growth through 2035, with a targeted compound annual growth rate of at least 8%. Management also plans to increase its dividend by around 10% this year and by 6% per year through the end of 2028.

Story Continues

What's behind such impressive growth for a utility stock ? AI demand is the biggest factor. NextEra's renewables leadership, including its significant nuclear power operations, should help ensure this stock remains a reliable compounder for years to come.

3. Brookfield Infrastructure: income and diversification

Brookfield Infrastructure offers two investment alternatives that share the same underlying business. You can buy units of the limited partnership (LP), Brookfield Infrastructure Partners, under the BIP ticker. If you don't want to deal with the tax hassles associated with investing in LPs, you can buy shares of Brookfield Infrastructure Corporation, which trades under the BIPC ticker.

Either stock provides nice income. Brookfield Infrastructure Partners' distribution yield currently stands at around 4.7%, while Brookfield Infrastructure Corporation's forward dividend yield is 4.5%. Management plans to increase the distribution by 5% to 9% per year.

Both infrastructure stocks also give you tremendous diversification. Brookfield Infrastructure owns cell towers, data centers, electricity transmission lines, fiber optic cable, natural gas pipelines, natural gas storage facilities, rail operations, semiconductor manufacturing foundries, toll roads, and more. Its operations span five continents.

Brookfield Infrastructure targets a total annual return on invested capital of between 12% and 15%. It expects to grow funds from operations (FFO) by at least 10% per year. Importantly, around 85% of the company's FFO is protected from, or indexed to, inflation. I view Brookfield Infrastructure as one of the most resilient combination growth/income alternatives on the market.

Three stocks, two decades, one caveat

Can buying and holding these three stocks for two decades really make you a millionaire? I think so.

However, there is one important caveat: No one knows what changes could come over the next 20 years. Adverse regulatory decisions, technological disruptions, and/or management missteps could cause any of these stocks to flounder. That said, GE Vernova, NextEra Energy, and Brookfield Infrastructure operate in sectors that should grow regardless of what happens with the economy.

news.Title: The Probability of a July Fed Rate Hike Has Tripled Over the Last Week -- Here's Why
news.Content:
Throughout history, the Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJINDICES: ^DJI), S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC), and Nasdaq Composite (NASDAQINDEX: ^IXIC) have demonstrated a knack for climbing the proverbial wall of worry. Thus far, geopolitical concerns stemming from the Iran war haven't stopped Wall Street's major stock indexes from reaching new highs.

However, inflation isn't a concern that's easily swept under the rug -- just ask the policymakers at the Federal Reserve .

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

The probability of a July FOMC rate hike has soared over the last week

In five days, on July 29, the 12-member Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC), including Fed Chair Kevin Warsh, will render its verdict on whether to raise or stand pat on interest rates. This decision can send shockwaves through the equity and bond markets.

On July 15, the CME Group 's proprietary FedWatch Tool, which tracks 30-day Fed funds futures prices to gauge the probability of changes to the federal funds target rate at upcoming meetings, predicted a 10.7% chance of an FOMC rate hike on July 29. By July 22, the probability of the FOMC raising interest rates had more than tripled to 34.7%.

There are likely three catalysts behind this projected surge in rate-hike probability.

Firstly, peace talks between the U.S. and Iran have deteriorated throughout the month, leading to military escalation. For its part, Iran has announced yet another closure of the Strait of Hormuz. This international waterway sees a fifth of the world's liquid petroleum pass through it daily.

Choking off 20 million barrels per day of petroleum supply has sent crude oil prices significantly higher over the last week. In other words, the short reprieve consumers enjoyed at the fuel pump in recent weeks may quickly disappear.

Secondly, Trumpflation (i.e., inflation specifically driven by President Donald Trump's policies) has entered its next phase. The price stickiness of Core Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) indicates that the inflationary effects of the Iran war extend well beyond the energy sector.

Historically, energy supply shocks are relatively short-lived. In comparison, broad-based inflation, as indicated by Core PCE, is considerably more challenging for FOMC policymakers to combat without raising interest rates.

Story Continues

And thirdly, the inflationary effects of the artificial intelligence (AI) data center build-out continue to ramp up. While investors in graphics processing unit makers and memory/storage solutions suppliers are smiling from ear to ear, persistent AI hardware supply shortages, coupled with otherworldly pricing power for these businesses, are pushing up prices for consumers.

Fed Chair Warsh and the FOMC have ample justification to raise interest rates next week. But if they do, it could rightly spell the end to the stock market's AI-driven rally. Debt financing is playing a meaningful role in the AI data center build-out. If borrowing costs climb, even a minor slowdown in this expansion could leave the second-priciest stock market in history vulnerable to significant downside.

news.Title: Palantir Is Down 25%. Here's Why I'm Buying More.
news.Content:
Once a high-flying stock, Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) isn't having a good year. The stock is down about 25% so far this year, putting it firmly in bear market territory.

But I'm convinced this is an outstanding buying opportunity for what I believe is the best artificial intelligence software company on the planet, and that's why I'm buying more shares of Palantir stock now.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

Palantir's software can't be replicated

The secret behind Palantir's success is its revolutionary software. The company collects data points from thousands of sources, including satellites, to provide real-time insights to commercial customers and government agencies. CEO Alex Karp described how the company works in a 2025 interview.

If you're an intelligence agency, you're using us to find terrorists and organized criminals while maintaining the security and data protection of your country. Then you have the special forces. How do you know where your troops are? How do you get in and out of the battlefield as safely as possible, avoiding mines, avoiding enemies? Then there's Palantir on the commercial side. The shorthand is if you're doing anything that involves operational intelligence, whether it's analytics or AI, you're going to have to find something like our products.

But the magic really began when Palantir incorporated its Artificial Intelligence Platform (AIP) into its Foundry and Gotham products, which allow users to pose detailed queries, automate tasks, and have AI propose and complete real-world tasks.

Three years after launching AIP, Palantir is continuing to grow at a staggering pace. Revenue in the first quarter was $1.63 billion, up 85% from a year ago. The company said its U.S. commercial revenue jumped 133% from a year ago to $595 million, and U.S. government revenue increased 84% to $687 million.

The company closed 206 deals in the first quarter, with at least $1 million each, 72 of them at least $5 million, and 47 at least $10 million. Overall, in the quarter, Palantir closed $2.41 billion in total contract value.

The company increased its full-year guidance, now calling for revenue in a range of $7.650 billion to $7.662 billion. Previous guidance was for revenue between $7.182 billion and $7.198 billion.

Story Continues

The valuation is improving

The biggest red flag for many investors has been Palantir's staggering valuation -- or, perhaps, its once-staggering valuation. In December, Palantir's forward price-to-earnings ratio was more than 240, and its forward price-to-sales ratio topped 90. But those numbers moderated in the first half of this year.

Yes, Palantir is still expensive. But it's a unique company providing software that is changing the way businesses operate, from managing supply chains to tracking inventory to conducting competitive analysis. And its military applications are significant enough that the Pentagon is making its AI-powered Maven Smart System an "official program of record," which would streamline Maven's adoption across all branches of the military and provide Palantir with long-term funding.

Palantir stock still has a long runway, which is why I'm buying the dip in 2026.

news.Title: 油價飆升＋外資台股提款609億，新台幣回貶至32.358元，短線承壓
news.Content:
【財訊快報／劉敏夫】台北外匯市場週五新台幣兌美元匯價走弱。美國總統川普威脅擴大對伊朗的軍事打擊，引發布蘭特原油價格突破每桶100美元大關，週四紐約匯市美元指數隨美債殖利率走揚，週五台幣等部分亞洲貨幣走貶。與此同時，台股表現欠佳，加權指數重挫2.67%再破季線，外資賣超上市股票達609.5億元，也不利台幣匯價行情。新台幣兌美元匯率週五以32.358元作收，與前一交易日比較，台幣匯率貶值9.2分。銀行間新台幣兌美元最高成交價落在盤初的32.290元，午後最低成交價觸及32.456元，成交量為19億1,100萬美元。

台灣央行此前公佈6月底外匯存款較去年同期成長15.3%，達到9.5兆元台幣並創歷史新高，主因出口表現強勁，出口商將資金停泊於外幣。

美國財政部公佈最新半年度的外匯政策報告，列出10個經濟體在「觀察名單」，其中台灣持續符合經常帳與對美順差兩項指標。

報告指稱，台灣在本次報告期間的經常帳盈餘進一步擴大，主要受全球對科技產品需求強勁所帶動；台灣對美國的雙邊貿易順差也顯著增加，延續過去五年的成長趨勢。

無論是根據經常帳、實質有效匯率(REER)或購買力平價(PPP)所建立的民間模型，普遍都顯示台幣存在相當程度的低估。

報告期間內，台灣央行持續淨買入外匯，其中大部分集中於2025年5月，當時台幣面臨急劇升值壓力。

news.Title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures rise after tech rout as new Trump tariffs take effect
news.Content:
US stocks eyed a tentative recovery before the bell on Friday as investors assessed a new set of global tariffs against a backdrop of AI jitters, rising oil prices, and elevated bond yields.

Dow Jones Industrial Average futures ( YM=F ) rose roughly 0.5%, while those on the S&P 500 ( ES=F ) edged 0.2% higher. Contracts for the tech-heavy Nasdaq-100 ( NQ=F ) nudged up 0.1% as Wall Street stocks attempted to stabilize after a sharp sell-off on Thursday, led by megacap tech names.

The major indexes were on track for weekly losses after the "Magnificent Seven" stocks collectively shed nearly $800 billion in market value on Thursday amid a sell-off sparked by Alphabet's ( GOOG , GOOGL ) and Tesla's ( TSLA ) ballooning AI spending. That tech sell-off spread to Asian markets, where South Korea's KOSPI ( ^KS11 ) and Japan's Nikkei indexes ( ^N225 ) fell.

Overnight, President Trump's latest set of global tariffs targeting nearly all US imports went into effect . The new Section 301 tariffs, which the administration hopes will better withstand legal scrutiny, levy rates of 10% to 12.5% on the US's top trading partners.

The White House exempted some energy products from those tariffs as markets contend with higher oil prices that threaten to derail progress on inflation and ripple throughout the economy.

Oil prices fell on Friday, with Brent crude futures down 2% to trade below $99 per barrel. But the nternational benchmark was set for a weekly gain after touching $100 per barrel.

The economic data to watch will be S&P Global's flash purchasing managers index updates on services and manufacturing in July, and new home sales. On the corporate front, American Express ( AXP ), NextEra Energy ( NEE ), and Verizon Communications ( VZ ) are among the companies reporting earnings.

news.Title: 《台股盤後》大跌1195點、10日線又失守；週K翻紅
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-07-24 16:07:40 新聞中心 發佈

美股四大指數週四全面收黑，台股今(24)日同步開低，雖緯創前進美國獲調升評等續漲3.2%、英業達挾中國AI題材上漲2.4%，但國巨又重挫7.8%、聯發科早盤一度挾GOOGLE增加資本支出而強勢走高但仍收跌3%，權王台積電也亦開低走低收跌2.3%，市場信心明顯受影響下，十大權值股無一收紅、南亞還跌停作收，且19大類股跌多漲少、僅貿易百貨/航運類股漲幅逾1%，拖累加權指數終場收在43654.84點，大跌1195.97點或2.67%，一舉跌破5日線、10日線與季線，成交量明顯萎縮至7924.35億元；週K翻紅，本週共計上漲983.57點或2.30%。

AI資本支出大增下，美國科技巨擘現金流由正轉負並重啟市場憂慮，再加上布蘭特原油期貨站上每桶100美元，衝擊美國四大指數23日全面走低，其中那斯達克指數重挫2%、寫逾一個多月新低。亞洲股市方面，因美國科技股上日重挫，日本AI、半導體相關股聞訊重摔，拖累日經225指數以低盤開出，收盤下挫2.73%；韓國KOSPI指數收跌5.72%。

台股今日賣壓明顯升溫，電子權值股普遍走弱，拖累大盤一路承壓。台積電盤中最低下探2345元，終場收在2350元，跌幅2.29%，國巨*、聯電雙雙下跌逾7%，台光電、鴻勁、日月光投控、台達電同步下挫。ABF載板族群延續昨日跌勢，南電收在跌停板價位，景碩、欣興也分別重挫超過9%、6%。

在29大類股表現方面，今日以居家生活類股表現最佳，上漲1.20%，貿易百貨漲1.15%，航運業漲1.12%，成為盤面上相對抗跌的三大族群。相較之下，塑膠與油電燃氣族群則跌勢較深，分別下跌8.01%、7.03%，主要係受到台塑四寶走弱影響，另外玻陶股下跌5.87%、電子零組件股下跌5.81%，跌幅分別居三與第四。

三大法人動向方面，今日三大法人合計賣超663.94億元；其中，自營商賣超111.51億元，投信買超57.08億元，外資及陸資賣超609.50億元。

《台股盤後》1783點寫史上最大漲點，重返44K

《台股盤後》崩跌2953點創史上最大跌點/失守季線 周K連2黑

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: This AI Stock Needs to Cool Off After Gaining More Than 200% Year to Date
news.Content:
Ultra Cleaning Holdings (NASDAQ: UCTT) has enjoyed an incredible rally in 2026. Shares are up by more than 200% year to date as more investors recognize the company's role in AI infrastructure.

The company's purity cleaning services get rid of contaminants on AI chips and semiconductor products during manufacturing to ensure GPUs function properly when customers buy them. Chip manufacturing equipment leaders Applied Materials (NASDAQ: AMAT) and Lam Research (NASDAQ: LRCX) are two of its largest customers.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

Ultra Cleaning Holdings is in the right industry at the right time, and it has some of the largest businesses in the foundry equipment space as its customers. However, that doesn't mean you should rush to buy the stock, particularly after its rally.

The multiyear rally needs time to show up in the company's financials

The overall thesis of AI infrastructure is solid. Hyperscalers continue to invest more money into AI data centers while generating higher revenue and profits. Tech giants need chips, which must go through multiple steps to advance from concepts to reliable products.

Ultra Cleaning Holdings plays a critical role in the chip industry, and CEO James Xiao told investors in the Q1 press release that the company "is in the early stages of a multi-year, AI driven expansion."

Yet its recent results tell a different story. Revenue only increased by 3% year over year in the first quarter. There wasn't even a key product segment that delivered exceptional growth. Its products segment sales increased from $457 million to $465.7 million, while service segment sales went from $61.6 million to $68 million.

Guidance was a bit more promising, with a midpoint of $585 million for Q2. That's a meaningful sequential jump, but Ultra Cleaning Holdings has a history of high sequential growth in the second quarter. That would still be a notable 12.8% improvement from the $518.8 million it reported in Q2 2025. But with other AI plays delivering much higher growth rates at this stage, it may be worth waiting for the stock to dip before buying it.

The company is still unprofitable

Not only is the company's revenue growth rate low compared to its recent stock gains, but Ultra Cleaning Holdings remains unprofitable. It wrapped up the first quarter with a $17.9 million net loss. Even its net operating income, which doesn't include taxes or interest, only came to $11.4 million, a slight decline from the $12.9 million it reported in Q1 2025.

Story Continues

Other companies that provide key components and services to the AI industry have seen their profit margins soar due to pricing power. Chipmakers have certainly led the way in this regard, but Applied Materials and Lam Research also saw their profit margins rise in their most recent quarters.

Ultra Clean Holdings has established itself as a beneficiary of the AI trend, but the stock's recent rally was disconnected from the company's fundamentals. Investors may want to monitor this stock from a distance and wait for any pullbacks.

news.Title: 永豐期貨：地緣風險疊加AI估值疑慮，台股殺千點失守四萬四
news.Content:
【財訊快報／編輯部】指數週五下跌1195.97點，收在43654.84點，成交量0.83兆元。台指期下跌1098點至43814點，正價差為159.16點。籌碼面部分，三大法人賣超663.94億元；而在台指期淨部位方面，三大法人淨空單增加1197口至-164口，其中外資淨空單增加1062口至-76260口；十大交易人中的特定法人全月份台指期淨多單減少1137口至5802口。受中東地緣政治風險升溫與美股科技股回檔拖累，台股週五遭遇猛烈拋售。加權指數開低走低，終場大跌1,195.97點（跌幅2.67%），收在43,654.84點；大盤成交量約7,924億元，顯示在系統性風險發酵下，資金加速撤出，市場避險與觀望氣氛極度濃厚。

盤面結構上，電子權值股淪為外資提款重災區。護國神山台積電大跌55元收2,350元，單檔即拖累大盤逾470點；鴻海、聯發科與廣達同步下挫。中小型股賣壓更為沉重，櫃買指數狂瀉3.69%。傳產板塊亦表現疲軟，塑化類股重挫逾5%，僅食品、營建等少數防禦型族群及航運股長榮逆勢微幅抗跌。

值得警惕的是，台經院週五特別示警，AI供應鏈存有高槓桿與估值集中的泡沫疑慮，這更加劇了本波市場去槓桿的修正壓力。總結來看，在國際利空尚未消化前，台股短線技術面已遭破壞。後續需密切觀察大盤能否在5日線附近止跌回穩，以及台積電能否重返季線。操作上切忌貿然接刀，建議嚴控部位風險，靜待市場恐慌情緒實質降溫。

選擇權未平倉量部分，08月買權最大OI落在55000點，賣權最大OI落在34000點 ; 07月F4買權最大OI落在44000點，賣權最大OI落在43600點。全月份未平倉量put/call ratio值由1.19下降至1.13。VIX指數上升2.35至38.09。外資台指期買權淨金額-0.71億元 ; 賣權淨金額0.84億元。

news.Title: 黑天鵝陰影再現！台股44K得而復失 台積電、AI股遭提款 市場陷避險潮
news.Content:
台股多頭反彈行情遭遇急煞車，受到美股科技股重挫、中東地緣政治風險升高，以及市場重新檢視AI投資回報週期等因素影響，加權指數今（24）日開低走低，盤中賣壓持續擴大，終場大跌1,195.97點，跌幅2.67%，收在43,654.84點，失守44,000點整數關卡。

集中市場成交金額縮減至7,941.75億元，市場呈現明顯避險格局，上漲346家、下跌662家，電子權值股與高評價AI概念股成為主要賣壓來源。

美股重挫＋地緣政治升溫 三大法人合計撤出663億元

受到國際市場風險情緒惡化影響，隔夜美股主要指數全面收黑，科技股遭遇獲利了結壓力，加上中東局勢升溫推升油價與通膨疑慮，市場重新評估高估值科技股未來獲利成長能否支撐目前評價。

台股早盤受美股下跌拖累，台積電(2330)開低，市場觀望氣氛升高；同時市場開始關注資本支出轉化為實際獲利的時間差，造成科技股短線賣壓升溫。

盤面資金快速轉向防禦型標的，部分正向槓桿ETF、原油相關ETF以及傳產族群吸引短線資金避險，顯示投資人風險偏好明顯下降。

法人籌碼方面，今日三大法人同步反映市場風險趨避情緒，合計賣超663.94億元。其中，外資賣超609.50億元，是今日主要賣壓來源；投信則逆勢買超57.08億元，自營商自行買賣小幅買超2.76億元，但自營商避險部位賣超114.27億元。

權值股遭外資調節 航運、財報亮眼股逆勢抗跌

電子權值股今日全面承壓，台積電(2330)終場下跌55元，收2,350元，跌幅2.29%，跌破短期均線支撐；聯發科(2454)大跌125元，收3,750元，跌幅3.23%；廣達(2382)下跌8元，收328元。

此外，鴻海(2317)下跌5元，收252.5元；台達電(2308)重挫95元，收1,785元，跌幅逾5%，顯示市場賣壓已由半導體擴散至AI伺服器與電源供應鏈。

除國際市場因素外，個股消息亦加劇盤面震盪。封測廠頎邦(6147)傳出遭檢調搜索消息後，股價爆量跌停，市場擔憂事件對公司營運與市場信心造成影響。

矽晶圓族群同樣受到衝擊，台勝科(3532)再度跌停，收379.5元，下跌42元，並拖累環球晶(6488)、合晶(6182)等相關個股走弱。

在大盤全面修正下，部分個股仍展現抗跌表現。貨櫃航運龍頭長榮(2603)逆勢上漲2.5元，收206元，市場資金部分轉向具防禦題材的傳產族群。

記憶體模組廠創見(2451)則因財報表現受到市場關注，逆勢上漲19.5元，收264元；緯創(3231)近期則受惠AI伺服器與輝達、超微相關題材支撐，同樣短線逆勢上漲。

市場進入高震盪期 需關注國際變數與籌碼變化

法人觀察指出，台股近期在快速反彈後，受到國際股市波動、地緣政治風險與高估值科技股修正壓力影響，短線震盪幅度明顯放大。

後續市場焦點仍將觀察國際油價走勢、美股科技股表現、AI產業投資回報預期，以及外資動向等因素。市場人士提醒，短線行情仍可能受

news.Title: 千點重挫摜破季線！台積電面臨關鍵保衛戰，AI工業電腦仍有亮點
news.Content:
【財訊快報／黃啟乙】國際股市再度震盪，日、韓今日雙雙重挫，拖累台股殺跌1195.97點或2.67%，指數再度跌破季線。從技術面來看，若季線後續無法守穩，則意味大盤恐有進一步向下探底的壓力。　　其中，台積電(2330)仍是左右大盤走勢的關鍵指標。就技術型態而言，目前股價也來到季線附近，若後續失守季線，恐意味中期整理格局將更加明確。

隨著時序進入下半年，AI應用持續落地，可望帶動相關產業需求升溫，其中工業電腦族群仍可視為多頭的重要觀察指標。樺漢(6414)週五收在500元整數關卡，若下週能持續守穩500元以上，仍有機會延續攻勢，並進一步帶動其他相關個股表現。

news.Title: Prediction: SpaceX Will Underperform Planet Labs This Year
news.Content: Space Exploration Technologies (NASDAQ: SPCX), or SpaceX, launched its IPO in June with high hopes. While it benefited from an initial bump, its fortunes quickly reversed, and shares now sell below its original IPO price. A likely reason for the pullback was the valuation of the communication stock, which remains extremely elevated. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX's IPO valuation is extremely elevated with a P/S ratio of 84, significantly higher than Planet Labs' 22.
• Planet Labs is projected to grow revenue by 42% in fiscal 2027, while SpaceX's revenue grew 33% in 2025 and is forecast to grow 109% in 2026.
• Despite SpaceX's high growth forecast, its valuation leaves room for significant downside risk.
• Planet Labs is considered to be in a stronger position to handle negative news due to its lower valuation.
news.Keywords: IPO valuation, P/S ratio, revenue growth, market capitalization, downside risk

news.Title: 台股重挫1195點！ 網見外資賣超嘆：中計了
news.Content:
台股今（24）日開低走低，終場重挫1195點，收在43654點，跌幅2.67%，成交值7924億元。三大法人同步站在賣方，合計賣超663億元，其中外資大舉提款609.5億元，再度成為壓垮盤勢的主要力量，也讓不少網友直呼「中計了」。

根據證交所公布籌碼動向，三大法人今日合計賣超663.94億元。其中，外資及陸資（不含外資自營商）賣超609.5億元，自營商則因避險操作賣超114.27億元，自營商自行買賣小幅買超2.76億元；投信則持續逆勢加碼，買超57.08億元，成為今日唯一買超的法人。

從今日盤勢來看，受到美國科技股賣壓蔓延影響，AI概念股普遍走弱，電子權值股成為空方狙擊目標，加權指數一路震盪走低，終場跌近1200點，成交量也縮減至7924億元，顯示市場追價意願轉趨保守。

投信今日仍持續扮演護盤角色，買超前十大個股依序為緯創10842張、大聯大6226張、華南金3606張、遠東新3225張、華邦電1688張、上海商銀1639張、台灣高鐵1569張、尖點1329張、統一1144張以及元大台灣50（0050）1000張。

不過，投信也同步調節部分半導體個股，賣超前十大包括聯電11282張、力積電6806張、強茂2985張、南亞科1841張、日月光投控1534張、國巨969張、景碩968張、大成鋼767張、台勝科713張及華通694張。

PTT股板也隨即掀起熱議，不少投資人對外資操作方式感到無奈。有網友直言「外資小買大賣，中計了」、「兩天買200多億，一天賣600多億，台股被提仙人跳」、「買超隨意買，賣超用力賣」，也有人感嘆「外豬提款到何時」、「小兒不回頭」、「外資賺死了」。

此外，也有不少人將焦點放在市場量能與融資變化，有人表示「量不到8千億，沒人玩了」、「今天融資我看又大減了」、「希望今晚融資大減」，認為籌碼清洗可能仍未結束；也有網友指出，「600億砸出2000點效果」，顯示低量環境下賣壓對指數的衝擊更加明顯。

整體而言，在外資大舉提款、成交量持續萎縮下，市場短線信心明顯受到衝擊。雖然投信仍持續逢低承接部分電子與金融股，但能否抵擋外資賣壓，仍將是後續台股能否止跌回穩的重要觀察指標。

（封面示意圖/AI生成）

news.Title: SpaceX Investors Should Mark Their Calendars for Aug. 4
news.Content: Since its initial public offering in June, Space Exploration Technologies (NASDAQ: SPCX) has arguably been the most widely discussed stock in the market. The company saw its stock soar out of the gate but has since given back much of those gains, despite joining several prominent market indexes sooner than most post-IPO stocks. While there is seemingly never a dull moment at the company, investors should definitely mark their calendars ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX will announce its second-quarter 2026 financial results on August 4th, with a conference call to follow.
• Consensus estimates project Q2 revenue of $6.87 billion and a loss of $0.28 per share, compared to Q1 revenue of $4.7 billion and a loss of $1.27 per share.
• A significant portion of insider shares will become eligible for sale following the earnings report due to lock-up expiration.
• Investors will be looking for insights into initiatives like Starship, data center deals, the Terafab facility, Grok Intelligence, and Starlink performance.
news.Keywords: Q2 earnings, financial results, lock-up expiration, revenue guidance, investor call

news.Title: 【Follow法人】台股重挫逾千點！外資翻臉重砍609億元 分析師曝下周觀察重點
news.Content:
台股今（24）日重挫逾千點，終場收在43654.84點。三大法人賣超663.94億元，其中外資大砍609.5億元，終結連2買。分析師表示，市場受到南韓提前實施去槓桿措施影響，外資同步撤出亞洲市場，不過若下周一台股能守住43654點頸線支撐，仍有機會在籌碼洗淨後迎來反彈。

根據證交所公布籌碼動向，三大法人今合計賣超663.94億元。其中外資賣超609.5億元，終結連2買。本周以來賣超470.64億元。

投信則是買超57.08億元，延續買超態勢，呈連23買。

自營商合計賣超111.52億元，其中自行買賣部分買超2.76億元，避險操作賣超114.27億元。

台股震盪走低，終場收在43654.84點，挫跌1195.97點、跌幅2.67%，創下史上第9大跌點，跌破季線43964點，成交金額新台幣7924.35億元。

顧德投顧分析師張家豪表示，韓國提早實施「去槓桿」規定，將原本預計於 8 月 5 日執行的規定提前至 7 月 31 日。這項變動導致韓國市場若無法補足保證金，將直接面臨斷頭風險，進而引發區域性的連鎖反應。因此，當亞洲特定區域出現系統性風險時，外資會針對整個區域進行資金撤出。

張家豪指出，今日收盤價43,654點剛好是7月14日的頸線位置，意味著回測支撐並進行第二次壓力測試，以清洗浮動籌碼，若下周一開盤後能守住此一頸線位置，並重新站穩向上，那麼今日的重挫就有機會轉化為籌碼洗淨後的反攻契機。

王詩婷／財經特派記者，主跑勞動部、半導體、生技等

news.Title: 三大法人賣超台股663.94億元
news.Content:
（中央社台北2026年7月24日電）台股今天跌1195.97點，收在43654.84點，成交值新台幣7924.35億元。三大法人外資及陸資賣超、投信買超、自營商賣超，合計賣超663.94億元。

自營商賣超111.51億元，投信買超57.08億元，外資及陸資賣超609.51億元。

news.Title: 台股殺千點免驚！ 專家：小級別抄底在下週、大決戰點在中秋
news.Content:
7/24（五）台股殺破1100點，44000點整數關卡與季線雙雙失守，滿版綠燈讓不少投資人手麻腳軟。然而，分析師周代運直言，當前大跌僅是技術面正常修正，投資人切莫自己嚇自己；短線抄底時間點預估落在下週二，而真正決定趨勢的大決戰點將在「中秋前後」，屆時仍有「大肉大月餅」可期待。

震盪洗盤非空頭基本面穩健

面對台股驚人跌幅，市場普遍焦慮多頭是否告終。分析師周代運於臉書表示：「你現在能從線圖上算出來的、畫得出支撐壓力的，全都是技術面的修正，本來就是多頭行情裡該有的正常波動。真正要命的是基本面轉空。那種時候，技術分析半點用都沒有。」

周代運進一步舉例指出，若回顧當年雷曼風暴或歐債危機的走勢圖，無論是月線、季線或前波大低點，所有支撐全是一捅就破，技術指標會全面失效。然而，本次台股壓回的本質完全不同，AI供應鏈訂單未跑、台積電資本支出未縮，整體上市櫃企業全年盈餘預期甚至持續上修。周代運強調，先前日線KD鈍化與量價背離已透露回檔風險，本次下跌僅是借著國際消息順勢洗盤，整體仍維持多頭格局。

技術支撐浮現下週二迎短彈

針對短線操作，周代運觀察小級別的抄底時間點大約落在下週二，對應支撐區間約在43000點上下。該位置為60分鐘線的前波整理平台疊加0.618黃金切割位，屬於小時線等級的技術支撐，跌到位後預計將迎來一波短彈。不過周代運特別提醒：「這就是個短線機會。手腳不快、不會設停損的人不要亂搶，搶到了也記得賺差價就跑，別當成長線佈局的買點抱著不放。」

中秋前後大決戰行情可期

對於中長線趨勢，周代運認為真正的大決戰點仍需等待中秋前後的變盤。每年此時皆為資金態度的分水嶺，隨著暑假行情告一段落與第三季財報預告釋出，外資下半年的布局邏輯將全面換檔。目前的千點波動僅是多頭途中的陣痛，中秋節過後依然有大行情可期。

（封面示意圖／AI生成）

news.Title: 【台股盤後】下挫1195點歷史第9大跌點　週線翻紅
news.Content:
（中央社記者潘智義台北2026年7月24日電）投資人對AI巨額支出擔憂浮現，加上中東衝突加劇推升國際油價，美股下挫。台股今天開低走低，終場下跌1195.97點，為歷史第9大跌點，摜破季線約43964點；本週加權指數上漲983.57點，週線翻紅。

台股加權指數收在43654.84點，跌1195.97點，跌幅2.67%，成交金額縮至新台幣7924.35億元。

權值股台積電 (2330) 收2350元，跌55元，跌幅2.29%；台達電 (2308) 收1785元，下挫95元，跌幅5.05%；鴻海 (2317) 收252.5元，跌5元，跌幅1.94%。

低軌衛星概念股昇達科 (3491) 收在最低1190元，跌110元，跌幅8.46%；啟碁 (6285) 收249.5元，跌9元，跌幅3.48%；華通 (2313) 收201.5元，下挫12.5元，跌幅5.84%。

塑化類股重挫，南亞 (1303) 收跌停177.5元；台塑化 (6505) 收85.8元，下挫7.94%。

記憶體族群南亞科 (2408) 收401元，跌5.87%；華邦電 (2344) 收154.5元，下挫4.04%。

第一金投顧副總經理留政鈺接受電訪表示，台股近來盤整原已大致告一段落，今天大跌主要還是反映Google快速擴充雲端業務，現金流轉負數，市場產生疑慮，加上中東衝突升溫使油價攀升，市場風險意識轉強。

留政鈺指出，短線先觀察下週美股重量級公司財報，如微軟、高通、安謀、Meta、蘋果、亞馬遜等。

news.Content:

台股加權指數收在43654.84點，跌1195.97點，跌幅2.67%，成交金額縮至新台幣7924.35億元。

權值股台積電收2350元，跌55元，跌幅2.29%；台達電收1785元，下挫95元，跌幅5.05%；鴻海收252.5元，跌5元，跌幅1.94%。

news.Title: 3大殺機害台股又崩千點 與其抄國巨、華邦電…不如抄2類安全標的「不會變記憶卡蛙」
news.Content:
美伊戰事升級，油價衝破百美元，還有美國對台灣課10%新關稅將於美東時間7/24生效，導致台股今(7/24)大逃殺，血崩1195點收43654點，很多人都趁機抄底，分析師股添樂認為，大盤月跌12%，指標股國巨跌40%，華邦電跌30%，很難判定誰是真貨或蹭熱度？又是槓桿人氣標的，與其抄科技股，不如改抄科技或主動式ETF，比如00935、00881或記憶體相關00947。

股添樂在臉書「股添樂股市新觀點」表示，台股過去1個月從高點48000修正最深到42000，下跌超過6200點，跌幅12%；代表中小型股的櫃買指數修正更猛，波段跌幅超過20%。

這段期間殺盤重心集中在記憶體、被動元件、IC設計、載板類股。例如國巨*(2327)1個月跌40%、華邦電(2344)、聯發科(2454)、欣興(3037)等指標股也跌30%。如果指標股都跌成這副德性，族群內的中小型股跌更猛，可以到40%、50%。

大家都知道股票賺錢的方法很簡單，說穿了就4個字「買低賣高」。不過遇到這種快速修正、天天都便宜的行情，真的敢出手抄底的人恐怕也有限。

台股最貼近記憶體主題的ETF就是00947

畢竟在股票上漲時期，我們知道龍頭有題材、有基本面支撐，但伴隨著龍頭上漲的同族群股票，到底誰是真貨、或者只是來蹭熱度？可能也根本沒人弄明白，偏偏這類股票又都是游資最喜歡上槓桿的標的，所以才會看到龍頭跌30%、成員可以跌40%、50%的情況。而且當市場反彈，它們還不一定跟上。

所以現在反而認為，與其在這種快速下跌階段抄科技股，不如改抄科技或主動式ETF。畢竟這類基金選股會挑有基本面支撐的類型，可以基本過濾掉一些地雷。

例如你要抄龍頭科技股，野村臺灣新科技50(00935)、國泰台灣科技龍頭(00881)這些大概就不會錯；如果你想抄記憶體又怕變記憶卡蛙，台股最貼近記憶體主題的ETF就是台新臺灣IC設計(00947)，南亞華邦群聯旺宏一次全包，7/22這天就彈6%；當然要挑主動式ETF也可以，就是風格常常變化不太容易掌握。

看到這裡，知道你在找一個關鍵字，怎麼沒有正2？抄底怎麼能不選它？主要原因在於，下半年行情不會走得像上半年走得這麼順，尤其正2這種槓桿型商品遇到盤整階段，波動耗損帶來的影響可不能忽略。所以下半年，挑原型ETF可能會比較適合一點。

news.Title: David Tepper Has 5% of His Portfolio in This Little-Known Energy Stock. Here's Why.
news.Content: Billionaire David Tepper made the bulk of his fortune investing on Wall Street, so it's understandable that people would peek into his hedge fund's holdings to get a look at where he's placing his bets. As of the first quarter (Q1), Tepper's hedge fund, Appaloosa Management, had $5.93 billion in assets under management, with ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Billionaire David Tepper's hedge fund, Appaloosa Management, has a 5.12% stake in energy company Vistra (VST), making it its seventh-largest holding.
• Vistra generates revenue through retail power supply and power generation, serving 5 million customers and selling electricity to U.S. power grids.
• Vistra is positioned to benefit from the AI boom by supplying power to data centers, evidenced by a 20-year power purchase agreement with Meta Platforms.
• Despite a 12% stock decline over the past year, Vistra's net income improved significantly to $1.03 billion in Q1 2026 from a $268 million loss in Q1 2025.
news.Keywords: Hedge fund holdings, energy sector, AI infrastructure, data centers, power purchase agreement

news.Title: 台股跌破季線　重挫1195點史上第9大跌點
news.Content:
（中央社記者潘智義台北24日電）美科技重挫，加上中東衝突加溫，以及韓股提前實施槓桿ETF新制等影響，台股今天開低走低，終場重挫1195點，創下史上第9大跌點，跌破季線43964點。

加權指數終場收在43654.84點，跌1195.97點，跌幅2.67%，成交金額新台幣7924.35億元。

市場看好Google雲端服務營收占比大增，但龐大資本支出造成現金流轉為負數，牽動美科技應聲走跌，加上中東衝突加溫，韓股將提前實施槓桿ETF新制，提高保證金，台股今天失守44000點關卡，惟週線上漲983.57點。

台積電收2350元，跌55元；台達電收1785元，下挫95元；鴻海收252.5元，跌5元。（編輯：楊凱翔、楊蘭軒）1150724

news.Title: 台股暴跌1195.87點、收43654點　外資法人轉賣超
news.Content:
本周初股民討論熱點的晶圓材料族群在今天也是殺聲震天，合晶跌停、收在114元，環球晶（見圖）差點跌停。（圖片來源／ GOOGLE 街景）

臺灣加權股價指數24日大跌1195.97點，2.67％，收在43654.84點，成交量7924億元，指數主要受到台積電等權值股下跌的影響，台積電再度跌回2400元以下，收盤下跌55元、收在2350元。聯發科則下跌125元、跌幅3.23％、收在3750元，台達電重跌5.05％、收在1785元。

台股24日受到油價大漲，美股下跌影響下跌1102點，外資結束過去兩天買超轉為賣超恐近百億元。熱門個股台光電大跌6.67％，重跌340元來到4755元。日月光也下跌5.55％，跌36元來到613元。

類股部分，ABF載板成殺盤重點，南電早上10點40分後便跌停鎖死，收在1110元，也把母公司南亞拉到跌停價177.5元，景碩大跌9.43％，收在711元，主動式ETF最喜歡持有的欣興比較抗跌，但亦跌了6.36％，收在839元。

本周初股民討論熱點的晶圓材料族群在今天也是殺聲震天，合晶跌停、收在114元，台勝科也跌停，單日大跌42元、收在379.5元，環球晶差點跌停，亦跌了8.04％，單日大跌90元、收在1030元。其他包括嘉晶也跌了7.48％、收在95.3元。

記憶體族群則呈現兩種走勢，記憶體銷售族群的創見大漲7.98％、收在264元。但記憶體製造的南亞科、華邦電、力積電仍大跌。跌幅最大的是力積電，大跌了6.67％，收在61.6元。南亞科則跌5.87％，收在401元，收在今日最低價。

今日反而是看各集團股表現，緯創和緯穎雙雙勁揚，緯穎漲4.75％，單日大漲265元，收在5730元。緯創則是上漲3.17％，收在179元。其他伺服器股各自表現，廣達下跌2.3％，收在328元，英業達上漲2.38％，收64.5元。

(原始連結)

news.Title: Strategy Has Now Gone 4 Weeks Without Buying Bitcoin. Should Investors Be Concerned?
news.Content: Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR) was a huge winner from 2024 through 2025 as it aggressively issued stock and debt to fund Bitcoin purchases. As Bitcoin's price continued to rise, Strategy's massive stockpile soared in value, allowing the company to easily raise more capital, creating a powerful cycle that amassed an enormous ...
news.AI_Summary:
• MicroStrategy (MSTR) has paused Bitcoin purchases for four consecutive weeks and is increasing cash reserves to $3.2 billion.
• The company holds 843,775 BTC at an average cost of $75,476, currently resulting in paper losses.
• The pivot to fortifying the balance sheet is a response to Bitcoin's volatility and potential for further decline, aiming to meet cash obligations.
• A concern is raised about the sustainability of MSTR's business model if its success relies solely on rising Bitcoin prices, as issuing stock to fund purchases dilutes existing shareholders.
news.Keywords: Bitcoin treasury, balance sheet fortification, cash reserves, business model risk, leveraged bet

news.Title: 台股續崩！終場收跌1195點至43654點 台積電下挫55元
news.Content:
美股四大指數收黑，台股今（24）天也應聲下挫，開盤先跌81.42點，且盤中跌勢持續擴大，最低一度重摔1243.41點，觸及43607.4點，加權指數終場下跌1195.97點，收在43654.84點，成交量7924億元。

權值股方面，台積電（2330）下跌55元，收在2350元，跌幅2.29%；鴻海（2317）下跌5元，收在252.5元，跌幅1.94%；聯發科（2454）下跌125元，收在3750元，跌幅3.23%；廣達（2382）下跌8元，收在328元，跌幅2.38%；台達電（2308）跌95元，收在1785元，跌幅5.05%。

責任編輯／馮康蕙

news.Title: 8月台股期指跌1007點
news.Content:
（中央社台北24日電）台北股市今天終場跌1195.97點，收43654.84點。8月台指期以43905點作收，下跌1007點，與現貨相較，正價差250.16點。

台灣期貨交易所為近2個月指數期貨契約訂定開盤參考價為，8月期貨44912點、9月期貨45099點。

台股今天終場跌1195.97點，收43654.84點，成交金額新台幣7924.35億元。

8月台指期貨以43905點作收，跌1007點，成交6萬8605口；9月期貨以44074點作收，跌1025點，成交415口。實際收盤價格以期交所公告為準。1150724

news.Title: 台股收跌1195點 老AI股強撐盤 「這模組」逆勢攻漲停
news.Content: 受國際局勢緊張情緒升溫及美股、亞股重挫影響，台股今（24）日一度大跌近1200點 ...
news.AI_Summary:

• 權值股如台積電、聯發科、鴻海均下跌，但部分「老AI股」如緯創、英業達逆勢上漲。

news.Title: Alphabet-Owned YouTube Ad Sales Hit a Record $11.06 Billion. Is YouTube Dangerously Close to Surpassing Netflix in Revenue?
news.Content: Alphabet's (NASDAQ:GOOG) (NASDAQ:GOOGL) YouTube has long been the leading user-created video platform, but the Google parent is so big that YouTube doesn't get the same level of attention it would if it were a standalone company. After all, YouTube makes up less than 10% of Alphabet's revenue, and it pales in comparison to the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet's YouTube reported record Q2 ad sales of $11.1 billion, a 12.8% year-over-year increase.
• YouTube's revenue is approaching Netflix's Q2 total revenue of $12.6 billion, with YouTube's growth rate slightly slower than Netflix's 13.4%.
• While Netflix reported a 33.4% operating margin, YouTube's is estimated to be in the teens due to revenue sharing with creators.
• Both platforms are expanding their offerings, with YouTube introducing premium subscriptions and Netflix launching an advertising tier, indicating continued growth potential.
news.Keywords: Ad revenue, streaming services, market share, operating margin, growth drivers

news.Title: I Ran the Numbers on Retiring 5 Years Early With VOO. Here's What Changed My Mind.
news.Content: Retiring early is a dream for many. Understanding whether it's a financially viable option is key. news.AI_Summary:
• The article analyzes two scenarios for early retirement using a portfolio 100% invested in the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF (VOO).

news.Content: Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG)(NASDAQ: GOOGL) gave investors plenty to debate in its second-quarter report this week, from 24% revenue growth to another big increase in its capital spending plans. Alphabet's stake in rocket maker SpaceX (NASDAQ: SPCX) was worth about $94 billion as of June 30. Zoom out, and the history behind that figure is extraordinary. In January 2015, ...
news.AI_Summary:

• The SpaceX stake is largely restricted from sale, with $80 billion under short-term restrictions and $14.1 billion until Q3 2027.

news.Title: Prediction: This Autonomous Driving Stock Will Be a Much Better Buy Than Tesla Over the Long Term
news.Content: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) recently started manufacturing its Cybercab autonomous robotaxi, but it faces two problems. First, the company's full self-driving software lacks widespread regulatory approval in the U.S., so the robotaxi won't be hitting the road at scale anytime soon. Second, Tesla is behind other operators, like Alphabet 's Waymo, which is already completing over 500,000 paid autonomous trips per week. Simply put, the autonomous arms race is complex, competitive, and extremely capital-intensive, but there is one ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's Cybercab robotaxi faces regulatory hurdles and lags behind competitors like Alphabet's Waymo, which completes over 500,000 paid autonomous trips weekly.
• Uber's strategy of partnering with autonomous vehicle companies and leveraging its existing ride-hailing network is presented as a potentially better long-term investment than Tesla's approach.
• Uber reported $53.7 billion in gross bookings in Q1 2026, with a significant portion currently paid to human drivers.
• Eliminating human driver costs through autonomous vehicles could theoretically add $23.6 billion in revenue for Uber in Q1 2026.

news.Title: Ford set to challenge Tesla after big new deal with tech giant
news.Content: Doug Field spent years at Apple working on a car the company never built. When Apple shut down Project Titan in early 2024, Field moved to Ford. He's been leading the automaker's technology strategy since. On July 23, you could see exactly what he's been building toward. Ford announced it had partnered with Apple to embed Apple Maps directly into its next generation of electric vehicles. Ford is the first automaker in the world to use Apple's brand new MapKit for Automotive software development kit, and the partnership goes well beyond putting a navigation app on a dashboard screen. What ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Ford is partnering with Apple to integrate Apple Maps natively into its next-generation EVs, starting with a midsize electric truck in 2027.
• This integration goes beyond CarPlay, embedding Apple Maps into the vehicle's operating system, independent of an iPhone connection.
• Ford will use Apple Maps data to enhance its BlueCruise hands-free highway driving system, aiming for point-to-point autonomy and eyes-off Level 3 driving by 2028.
• The partnership is seen as a significant move by Ford to close the software gap with Tesla, particularly in navigation and autonomous driving capabilities.
news.Keywords: automotive technology, EV platform, integrated navigation, autonomous driving systems, competitive strategy

news.Title: 台積電砸千億美元赴美！ 外媒揭「超強訊號」：拉回就是買點
news.Content:
晶圓代工龍頭台積電（2330）16日舉行法說會，除了公布亮眼第2季財報，更宣布追加1000億美元投資美國亞利桑那州，將用於興建2奈米及更先進製程晶圓廠，以及先進封裝廠。面對市場近期對AI（人工智慧）基礎建設是否過度投資的疑慮，美國投資媒體 《The Motley Fool》 認為，台積電這筆千億美元級投資，反而透露AI晶片需求依舊強勁，甚至可能持續多年，投資人可把握股價回檔之際重新評估布局機會。

台積電第2季交出強勁成績單，合併營收約1兆2703.8億元，稅後純益約7065.6億元，每股盈餘（EPS）27.25元，營收年增36%，稅後純益與EPS更同步年增77.4%，單季表現相當亮眼。公司同時宣布追加1000億美元投資美國，讓對美投資規模進一步擴大，主要鎖定先進製程與先進封裝產能，以因應美國主要客戶未來多年的需求。

《The Motley Fool》指出，市場近期開始擔心AI產業是否出現「過度建設」，大型科技公司投入巨額資本支出，未來能否創造相應回報仍受到質疑。不過，AI超大規模雲端業者（Hyperscalers）目前仍持續大舉投資，台積電的擴產計畫更可視為觀察產業需求的重要指標。

報導分析，台積電若願意投入1000億美元擴充美國產能，前提必然是公司掌握到足夠強勁且長期的訂單需求，否則不會進行如此龐大的資本配置。這項決策也被視為AI基礎建設熱潮仍未結束的重要訊號。

此外，台積電董事長暨執行長魏哲家在法說會上談及AI需求時表示，強勁的晶片需求可望持續至2029年至2030年，甚至可能催生全新的產業。外媒認為，魏哲家長期與全球AI晶片設計商及大型雲端業者密切接觸，對產業需求的掌握程度可能高於一般投資人與市場分析師，因此相關看法受到市場關注。

報導也指出，台積電在先進製程具備規模與技術優勢，輝達（Nvidia）、超微（AMD）及博通（Broadcom）等AI晶片設計大廠均與其合作。隨著美國新廠逐步擴產，台積電可望進一步掌握AI產業成長機會。

值得注意的是，台積電股價近期從高點回落，外媒估算目前預期本益比約23.4倍，認為若AI需求如預期持續成長，股價修正可能反而提供長線投資人重新布局的機會。

（封面圖／台積電提供）

news.Title: 地緣政治升溫　美財報股重挫　台股週五震盪回測44K
news.Content:
【緯來新聞網】美國財集財報周進入最高潮，Alphabet 與特斯拉公布財報後，市場再度擔憂大型科技公司投入鉅額資金發展人工智慧(AI)，能否轉化為相應獲利；另一方面，美伊戰火擴大推升能源供應中斷風險，布蘭特原油突破每桶 100 美元，加劇通膨與升息疑慮，拖累股票及債券價格同步走低，美股四大指數全數收黑，台股周五（24日）早盤同步下挫，一度大跌逾8百點，跌破4萬4千點，反應投資市場的不安情緒。

美國財集財報周進入最高潮，Alphabet 與特斯拉公布財報後，市場再度擔憂大型科技公司投入鉅額資金發展人工智慧(AI)，能否轉化為相應獲利（圖／Artlist）

今日盤面焦點個股開盤後表現，台積電（2330）下跌50元來到2355元，跌幅2.08％，後再走跌至2350元；鴻海（2317）下跌3.5元至254元；廣達（2382）下跌6元來到330元；聯發科（2454）下跌70元至3805元後，低接買盤湧入隨即翻紅，搭配CPO、工業電腦、軍工等族群點火，指數跌幅並沒有進一步擴大。

Alphabet(GOOGLUS)、Tesla(TSLA-US)公布最新財報顯示現金流轉負，引發市場對AI投資回報能力的擔憂，中東局勢推升布蘭特原油突破百元大關、美債10年期殖利率衝破4.7％，再度引發市場通膨與升息擔憂，所幸英特爾盤後財報亮眼淡化市場負面情緒。

近期台股在月線下持續震盪，受外部利空衝擊且外資夜盤期貨再度加空，籌碼面仍待沉澱，預期短線將於季線至月線區間震盪。專家表示，若再次跌破季線，短中期均線將形成蓋頭反壓，台股整理期將拉長。操作建議保持適度資金彈性，避免過度槓桿，反彈汰弱留強，選股以流動性佳的中大型AI權值股為主。

news.Title: Morgan Stanley sends strong verdict on memory stocks
news.Content: Memory stocks were the hottest trade of 2026 until they weren't. In the span of a few weeks, one of the market's best-performing sectors flipped into a bear market . Micron ( MU ), Samsung , and SK Hynix (SKHY) all fell more than 20% from their late-June highs, and the Roundhill Memory ETF went down with them. Then Morgan Stanley told clients that the selling had gone too far, and it looks like there is a chance to buy . The firm's verdict deserves a closer look before taking your next investment decision. Why Morgan Stanley calls the memory ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Morgan Stanley views the recent selloff in memory stocks (including Micron) as a 'compelling entry point', suggesting fundamentals remain strong.
• The decline was driven by soft demand signals from consumer electronics, which Morgan Stanley considers misleading indicators for the sector.
• AI data center demand is the primary driver, with memory prices for data centers expected to rise at least 25% from Q2 to Q3.
• A structural memory shortage is anticipated to intensify in 2027-2028, with Micron securing $22 billion in supply commitments with take-or-pay clauses.
news.Keywords: memory stocks, AI demand, data center, supply shortage, price appreciation

news.Title: 台積電115年度第3期無擔保普通公司債7/30交付
news.Content:
公開資訊觀測站公告

(2330)台積電-公告募集及交付台灣積體電路製造股份有限公司115年度第3期無擔保普通公司債

公告事項：

一、公司名稱：台灣積體電路製造股份有限公司。

二、公司債總額及債券每張之金額：發行總額為新台幣185億元整，依發行期限之不同分為甲類及乙類2種。甲類為新台幣140億元整，乙類為新台幣45億元整。每張票面金額為新台幣壹仟萬元壹種。

三、公司債之票面利率及計息方式：

1.票面利率：本公司債甲類之票面利率為固定年利率2.03%；乙類之票面利率為固定年利率2.10%。

2.計息方式：本公司債自發行日起依票面利率，每年單利計、付息乙次。計息基礎依實際天數/該年度實際總日曆天數計算。本公司債付息金額每新台幣壹仟萬元計算至元為止，元以下四捨五入。本公司債還本付息日如為付款地銀行業停止營業日時，則於停止營業日之次一營業日給付本息，且不另計付利息。如逾還本付息日領取本息者，亦不另計付遲延利息。

四、公司債償還方法及期限：

1.期限：本公司債甲類發行期限為五年期、乙類發行期限為十年期。

2.還本方式：均為到期一次還本。

五、償還公司債款之籌集計劃及保管方法：

1.本次公司債存續期間之償債款項來源，將以營業收入支應。

2.為確保償債款項來源無虞，本次公司債存續期間所擬支應款項來源，除備供提撥標的之公司債支付本息外，所為運用標的將注意評估其風險及必要性。

3.本公司將依規定持續於公開資訊觀測站辦理相關資訊之公開。

六、公司債募得價款之用途及運用計劃：支應本公司綠建築及綠色環保相關之支出。

七、前已募集公司債者，其未償還之數額：截至民國115年3月31日止，公司債未償還餘額為新台幣4,879億元及美金20億元整、子公司TSMC Global Ltd.發行之公司債美金65億元整、及子公司TSMC Arizona Corp.發行之公司債美金80億元整。(截至民國115年7月15日止，公司債未償還餘額為新台幣4,878億5仟萬元與美金20億元整、子公司TSMC Global Ltd.發行之公司債美金54億元整，及子公司TSMC Arizona Corp.發行之公司債美金80億元整。)

八、公司債發行價格或最低價格：本公司債依票面金額十足發行。

九、公司股份總額與已發行股份總數及其金額：截至民國115年3月31日及民國115年7月15日止，核定股本額為新台幣280,500,000,000元整，每股面額新台幣10元整，已發行股本總額為新台幣259,323,700,670元整，分為25,932,370,067股。

十、公司現有全部資產，減去全部負債後之餘額：截至民國115年3月31日止，該項餘額為新台幣5,932,388,921仟元。

十一、公司債債權人之受託人：台北富邦商業銀行股份有限公司。

十二、代收款項之銀行名稱及地址：不適用。

十三、承銷或代銷機構：台新綜合證券股份有限公司為主辦承銷商。

十四、有發行擔保者，其種類、名稱：無。

十五、有發行保證人者，其名稱：無。

十六、對於前已發行之公司債或其他債務，曾有違約或遲延支付本息之事實或現況：無。

十七、可轉換股份者，其轉換辦法：不適用。

十八、附認股權者，其認購辦法：不適用。

十九、簽證機構：不適用。

二十、還本付息代理機構：本公司債委託台北富邦商業銀行股份有限公司市府分公司代理還本付息事宜。

二十一、交付日期：本公司債自民國115年7月30日交付。

二十二、特此公告。

兆豐證券認購(售)權證終止上市彙總表

上市認購(售)權證7/27彙總表
